The clinic specializes in sports medicine, arthroscopy, knee & shoulder injuries, Complex Joint Surgeries, joint replacement and robotic surgeries. Our mission– to restore movement, relieve pain, and strengthen lives. Equipped with advanced technology and a compassionate care approach, the Clinic is committed to providing world-class orthopaedic solutions at an affordable price. Currently sees patients at Dr Vinoth's Advanced Ortho Clinic - Adyar, Apollo Speciality Hospitals and Sugam Hospitals. He has gained vast experience at Soundarpandiyan Bone and Joint Hospital, Chennai and Sakra world hospital, Bangalore in the past. Why chose Dr Vinoth? Driven by a patient-centric approach, he ensures that every treatment plan is tailored to the individual, emphasizing both recovery and long-term wellness. His expertise in minimally invasive ,Arthroscopic and robotic-assisted surgeries makes him a trusted choice for athletes, active individuals, and patients seeking advanced orthopaedic care. Dr Vinoth is regarded as a pioneer in advanced arthroscopic surgeries where he introduced a new Arthroscopic sliding knot which was published in well acclaimed International journal of Arthroscopy and Joint Surgery.
